symptom_vector: node CPU overload with high CPU usage and service degradation

expert_knowledge.root_cause_desc: aiops-k8s-04 节点因 node_cpu_usage_rate 指标异常飙升导致节点资源耗尽，引发服务性能下降
reasoning_chain: Step 1: 观察到 aiops-k8s-04 节点的 node_cpu_usage_rate 指标从正常中位数 19.62% 飙升至 93.54%，变化率高达 1.3065
Step 2: 分析该节点上运行的服务（frontend-2, currencyservice-1, checkoutservice-0）普遍出现 rrt_max 和 error_ratio 指标异常
Step 3: 确认节点级 CPU 资源耗尽是根本原因，能够合理解释多个服务同时出现性能问题的现象

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Significant increase from baseline (19.62% → 93.54%, change rate 1.3065)
critical_checks.instruction: 检查 aiops-k8s-04 节点的 node_cpu_usage_rate 指标是否出现异常飙升，重点关注中位数和 P99 值的变化

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Abnormal pattern that may correlate with CPU usage
critical_checks.instruction: 检查 aiops-k8s-04 节点的网络接收包总数指标，分析是否与 CPU 使用率异常存在关联

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Increased response times for services running on affected node
critical_checks.instruction: 检查运行在 aiops-k8s-04 节点上的服务（如 frontend-2, currencyservice-1, checkoutservice-0）的 rrt_max 指标是否显著增加

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Elevated error rates for services on affected node
critical_checks.instruction: 检查运行在 aiops-k8s-04 节点上的服务的 error_ratio 指标是否出现异常升高
